patches.find: BOU shifts from r=5715 (V50.6) to r=9983 (V51).
patches.replace: BOU shifts from r = 5,715 km (V50.6) to r = 9,983 km (V51).
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon WIN-044.c5 H1: technical-source paragraph omits km units and comma formatting.

patches.replace: the predicted value (the sidereal day / K1 tidal period, ~23.934 h)
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon WIN-049.c3 H2: verdict only references sidereal_day constant; evidence frames the period as K1 tidal constituent. Bridges the two framings.

patches.find: The BOU-2017 trilemma below holds whichever published rule the dome elects to defend.
patches.replace: The BOU-2017 trilemma below leads to the same admission whichever published rule the dome elects to defend — accept the rule and concede the signal, or revise it and admit the prediction was untestable.
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon SEC-4.2.2-EXP275.c5 H4: overclaim softened; trilemma arithmetic is amplitude-specific.

patches.find: the very signature the predictions.html rule asks the August 2026 measurement to lack.
patches.replace: the very signature the predictions.html rule treats absence of as falsification — BOU 2017 already showed it.
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon SEC-4.2.2-EXP275.c5 H5: double-negated clause rewritten to positive form.

patches.find: identify Tenerife within ~25 km, so we read the dome's E007 entry as referring to GUI.
patches.replace: are coincident with GUI's IAGA-registered coordinates (28.321° N, 16.432° W) to three decimal places, so we read the dome's E007 entry as referring to GUI.
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon SEC-4.2.7a-EXP-276.c3 H3: coordinates match to 3 decimal places, not merely within 25 km.

patches.find: The above charity already grants the dome a non-circular Moon orbit.
patches.replace:
Under the standard Rdisc/90 convention used in the per-station table above, the disc-radius band around the Moon’s projected ground track is 85 km wide.

The above charity already grants the dome a non-circular Moon orbit.
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon SEC-4.2.7a-EXP-276.c3 H4: constant-r subsection did not name the R_disc/90 convention. One sentence makes the 85 km band-width derivation transparent.
